'''shayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibrotamide|ibrotamide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibrotamide|ibrotamide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shayaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæyækæth|shæyækæth]] || [[word:shæyækæj|shæyækæj]] || [[word:shæyækæsh|shæyækæsh]] || [[word:shæyækæ|shæyækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shayayakath|shayayakath]] || [[word:shayayakaj|shayayakaj]] || [[word:shayayakash|shayayakash]] || [[word:shayayaka|shayayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shayakath|shayakath]] || [[word:shayakaj|shayakaj]] || [[word:shayakash|shayakash]] || [[word:shayaka|shayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shayafkath|shayafkath]] || [[word:shayafkaj|shayafkaj]] || [[word:shayafkash|shayafkash]] || [[word:shayafkaf|shayafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shayakatha|shayakatha]] || [[word:shayakaja|shayakaja]] || [[word:shayakasha|shayakasha]] || [[word:shayakaka|shayakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shayakath|shayakath]] || [[word:shayakaj|shayakaj]] || [[word:shayakash|shayakash]] || [[word:shayaka|shayaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shayakathal|shayakathal]] || [[word:shayakajal|shayakajal]] || [[word:shayakashal|shayakashal]] || [[word:shayakakal|shayakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shayakathatha|shayakathatha]] || [[word:shayakajaja|shayakajaja]] || [[word:shayakashasha|shayakashasha]] || [[word:shayakaka|shayakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shayakathan|shayakathan]] || [[word:shayakajan|shayakajan]] || [[word:shayakashan|shayakashan]] || [[word:shayakakan|shayakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shayakathaoro|shayakathaoro]] || [[word:shayakajaoro|shayakajaoro]] || [[word:shayakashaoro|shayakashaoro]] || [[word:shayakakaoro|shayakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
